introBio: Enthusiastic and detail-oriented Computer Science graduate with a very strong and firm foundation in programming, algorithms, and system design. Passionate about building scalable, efficient, and maintainable software solutions. Eager to apply analytical thinking and problem-solving skills to real-world challenges while contributing to innovative and collaborative development teams. Highly motivated to continuously learn new technologies, improve development practices, and deliver high-quality software with strong commitment, adaptability, and professionalism.
nsuDesc: North South University (NSU) is a leading private research university in Dhaka, Bangladesh, established in 1992 and known for its strong academic programs and modern campus facilities. It offers a range of undergraduate and graduate degrees with English as the medium of instruction and emphasizes research, international collaboration, and industry engagement. It is consistently ranked among the top universities in the country and has a vibrant student community with active extracurricular and learning opportunities.
accDesc: Adamjee Cantonment College (ACC) is a well‑established co‑educational institution in Dhaka Cantonment, Bangladesh, founded in 1960 and managed by the Bangladesh Army. It offers higher secondary through undergraduate and postgraduate programs with a strong emphasis on discipline, morality, and academic excellence. The college is known for its disciplined environment, diverse extracurricular activities, and history of strong academic results.
acpsDesc: Adamjee Cantonment Public School is a prestigious primary and secondary boys’ school located in Dhaka Cantonment, Bangladesh, established in 1960 and managed by the Bangladesh Army. It offers education from Grade I to X in both Bangla and English versions, emphasizing education, discipline, and character. The school is known for its structured learning environment, strong academic reputation, and vibrant extracurricular activities.
jobDescBMA: Bangladesh Military Academy (BMA) is the premier training institute for officers of the Bangladesh Army, located in Bhatiary, Chattogram. Officer Cadets are young men and women selected to undergo rigorous military, physical, and academic training to become commissioned officers. The academy emphasizes leadership, discipline, physical fitness, and tactical skills. Upon successful completion, officer cadets are commissioned into various branches of the Bangladesh Army.
jobDescMarksIntern: Developed  HR Management System and ERP Software using Django. Developed the company’s official website.
jobDescMarksJSWE: Developed Energy Management System software using Django and ChartJS. Connected different IoT devices and Electricity meters thorough MODBUS and OPC-UA protocol and fetched real-time data using Python’s PyModbus library.
